meta.title: Npcink Ad Promotion scale benchmark
meta.author: Npcink
meta.description: Installs the packaged plugin and measures bounded 100/500 Promotion management paths.

steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; try { require '/wordpress/npcink-ad-scale-benchmark.php'; } catch (Throwable $throwable) { $directory = WP_CONTENT_DIR . '/npcink-ad-performance-results'; wp_mkdir_p($directory); file_put_contents($directory . '/result.json', wp_json_encode(array('status' => 'NPCINK_AD_SCALE_BENCHMARK_HARNESS_ERROR', 'measured_at_utc' => gmdate('c'), 'wordpress' => get_bloginfo('version'), 'php' => PHP_VERSION, 'error' => get_class($throwable) . ': ' . $throwable->getMessage()), JSON_PRETTY_PRINT | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES) . PHP_EOL); }
